Fields

FDO_ARCHIVE_MISSING_NEEDED_HISTORY = -2147212920

-2147212920: Archive is missing the history needed for the operation.

-2147212930: Cannot register data as replicas in a transport FileGDB. Only xml transport file is supported.

-2147212531: The network dataset abbreviations table is not registered in the Geodatabase.

-2147208459: Acquring a Serialization Transaction lock must be in a transaction.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_CENTERLINE_HAS_ASSOCIATED_ROUTES = -2147207160

-2147207160: The following LRS centerline cannot be deleted because it has routes associated with it: OID =

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_CENTERLINE_WILL_CAUSE_NON_MONOTONIC_ROUTE = -2147207163

-2147207163: The modified centerline geometry will result in an uncalibrated or non-monotonic route.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_CP_MOVED_OFF_ROUTE = -2147207154

-2147207154: The calibration point has been moved outside of the tolerance of the route.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_CURVES_NOT_SUPPORTED = -2147207164

-2147207164: Bezier curves and circular arcs are not supported in an LRS centerline layer.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_GAPCALIBRATION_FSRULE_ERROR = -2147207159

-2147207159: Invalid LRS gap calibration rule. Euclidean Distance, Adding Increment with nonzero offset, and Stepping Increment with nonzero offset are only allowed on branch versioned feature service LRS networks.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_GCS_TOO_LONG_POLYLINE_IN_CARTOREALIGNMENT = -2147220449

-2147220449: There was an error during cartographic realignment. This can happen if your data is in GCS, the centerline is long and has sparse vertices. Consider densifying the centerline, running Generate Routes and retrying the edit.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_GENERIC_FEATURE_UPDATE_ERROR = -2147207167

-2147207167: Linear Referencing: Feature update failed.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_MISSING_LOCKS = -2147207165

-2147207165: The following feature has associated routes or lines which need to be locked before performing an edit: [FC | OID] =

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_NON_MONOTONIC_ROUTE = -2147207155

-2147207155: Invalid edit because the resultant route will be a non-monotonic route.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_PARTIAL_POST_NOT_ALLOWED = -2147207156

-2147207156: Partial post is not allowed for Linear Referencing datasets.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_PART_COUNT_CHANGE_NOT_ALLOWED = -2147220451

-2147220451: The cartographic realignment will result in a change in the centerline part count. Use the Split Centerline Into Singlepart Features tool on the centerline before performing the edit.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_RUN_AEB_BEFORE_POST = -2147207162

-2147207162: LRS route edits have been made on the edit version. Please run the Apply Event Behaviors tool before posting your changes.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_RUN_AEB_BEFORE_RECONCILE = -2147207161

-2147207161: LRS route edits have been made on the default version. Please run the Apply Event Behaviors tool before reconciling.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_SIMPLIFY_WILL_AFFECT_ROUTE_LENGTH = -2147207158

-2147207158: The chosen centerlines will result in a decrease in geometric length when they are used to build the resulting route. This may be caused if the centerlines have overlapping sections or the geometries have degenerate segments. Make sure the chosen centerlines d

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_SYNC_FAILED = -2147207152

-2147207152: Failed to apply event behaviors for the event with route ID:

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_SYNC_MISSING_FIELDS = -2147207153

-2147207153: The From measure or To measure is missing from the event with route ID:

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_TOOLS_TO_EDIT = -2147207157

-2147207157: Only Linear Referencing tools can be used to edit this feature/field.

FDO_E_LINEAR_REFERENCING_UNAVAILABLE_LOCKS = -2147207166

-2147207166: The following feature has associated routes or lines which are already locked by other users or in other versions: [FC | OID] =

FDO_E_MISSING_ORIGIN_OR_DESTINATION_OBJECT = -2147211170

FDO_E_MULTIPLE_WAVELENGTH_SCHEMES_FOUND = -2147208353

FDO_E_MUST_BE_OBJECTIDS_OR_GLOBALIDS = -2147207383

-2147212950: Invalid output xml file

-2147212959: Replica in a SendingData state

FDO_E_REPLICA_LOCKED = -2147212963

-2147212963: Another synchronization in progess has locked the replica

FDO_E_REPLICA_NAME_ALEARDY_EXISTS = -2147212938

-2147212938: Replica with the same name already exists.

FDO_E_REPLICA_NOT_FOUND = -2147212972

-2147212972: Replica data was not found.

FDO_E_REPLICA_NO_UNACKNOWLEDGED_GENERATIONS = -2147212957

-2147212946: Messages have already been acknowledged.

FDO_E_REPLICA_RECEIVER_CANNOT_EXPORT_CHANGES = -2147212953

FDO_E_REPLICA_RECEIVER_CANNOT_REEXPORT_CHANGES = -2147212954

FDO_E_REPLICA_REQUIRES_ROWS = -2147220627

-2147220627: The trim date must be older than the date the map was taken offline.

FDO_E_REPLICA_SCHEMA_CHANGES_WRONG_DIRECTION = -2147212945

-2147212945: Cannot import schema changes from a replica to itself.

FDO_E_REPLICA_SYNC_VERSION_NOT_YET_POSTED = -2147212942

FDO_E_REPLICA_TRACKING_NOT_SUPPORTED = -2147204863

FDO_E_REQUIRED_INTERFACE_NOT_FOUND = -2147217386

-2147217386: A required interface on the feature was not found.

FDO_E_RESOLUTION_DOES_NOT_MATCH_PERMISSIBLE_VALUE = -2147216883

-2147212653: The geometry must have polyline geometry type.

-2147212645: A turn must include at least two edges.
